scripts.setup: bun i && bun run gini install --instance $(basename $(pwd))
scripts.remoteSetup: bun i && bun run gini install --instance $(basename $(pwd))
scripts.archive: bun run gini uninstall --instance $(basename $(pwd)) && rm -rf node_modules && ~/.claude/projects/-Users-shelden-conductor-workspaces-gini-agent-$(basename $(pwd))
